@graph.name: Taiwan Stock Radar
@graph.description: Taiwan Stock Radar 是一個以單一台股為核心的多 Agent 研究網站，展示如何讓 AI analyst 針對一檔股票進行正式會議式分析。 Taiwan Stock Radar is a professional website for single-stock Taiwan equity analysis through a multi-agent research council.

@graph.name: Taiwan Stock Radar
@graph.description: Taiwan Stock Radar 是一個開源台股 AI research skill，會讓多位 specialist AI analyst 對同一檔股票開會，輸出趨勢情境、買賣區間與失效條件。 Taiwan Stock Radar is an open-source Taiwan equity research skill that runs a specialist AI council around one stock and returns scenarios, action zones, and invalidation rules.
